languages.title: Ɗemngal
languages.subtitle: Suɓo ɗemngal kuutorteengal e nder app oo fof.
languages.noResults: Alaa ɗemngal nanndungal e njiylawu maa.

phone.label: Limoore telefoŋ
phone.searchCountry: Yiylo leydi, kod, walla jokkorgal noddaango
phone.noCountries: Alaa leyɗe nannduɗe e njiylawu maa.
phone.tooShort: Ngol tonngoode telefoŋ ina juuti no feewi.
phone.tooLong: Ngol tonngoode telefoŋ ina juuti sanne.
phone.invalid: Naatnu tonngoode telefoŋ moƴƴere wonande leydi cuɓaandi ndii.

auth.onboardingTagline: Sehil kisal neɗɗo ngam wakkatiiji hakkunde “miɗo laaɓi” e “miɗo haani ballal.”
auth.createSubtitle: Suɓo feere naatnude ngam reende nate kisal maa.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Min mbaawaano timminde naatgol. Ƴeewto jokkorde maa, ƴeewto kadi.
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: Naftoraade jonnde ƴellitaare nokkuure. Naatgol Google native ina gollira e nder mahngo ɓamtaare.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair jooni walla jokku ɓeydu ɗum caggal.
auth.northStarBody: VL01 wearable ina waawi udditde doggol kisal e tappirɗe e geɗe juutɗe.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle: Sehil maa kisal leefɗo e dow kartal e nder noddaango.
auth.capybearBody: Capybear ina waawi wallude e mbaadi galle, mbaadi gardinooɗo, mbaadi caɗtundi, noddaango yaafuya, e ballal daande.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Hutortee ko e kartal, nokkuuji kulɓiniiɗi, gargol kisal, e SOS ngonka.
permissions.locationBody: VeryLoving naamndii nokku ngam gardiiɗo ina waawa faamde ɗo ballal waawi haajde. Aɗa waawi waylude ɗum caggal e nder Cuɓe.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Notifikaaji ina mballita e ƴeewndorɗe e kewuuji caɗtuɗi.
permissions.notificationsBody: Min kuutortoo tan ko humpitooji ngam humpitaade kisal, keso, e siftorde nde softinir-ɗaa.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Nokku ina jogoo ngonka kisal laaɓtuka
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: VeryLoving huutortoo ko nokku maa ngam kartal kisal, nokkuuji kulɓiniiɗi, renndinde yaawnde, e SOS ngonka. Aɗa waawi waylude ɗum caggal e nder Cuɓe.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving neldata ko siftorde ƴeewndo, kesɗitingol cakkitiingol, e jamirooje kisal ɗe softinir-ɗaa. Min kuutortaako humpitooji ngam yeeyde.
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: VeryLoving huutortoo ko mikroo maa tan so a fuɗɗiima noddaango AI sehil walla noddaango kisal.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth ina jokkondiri e ɓoornotooɗo maa
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: VeryLoving huutortoo ko Bluetooth ngam jokkondirde e NorthStar jewelry, janngude ngonka jokkorde, e udditde doole kisal ummoraade e ɓoorneteeɗo.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage: VeryLoving huutortoo ko kamera tan so a suɓiima ƴettude foto lowre walla renndinde natal kisal.

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving ina jokki e ndee doggol e nder Cuɓe e dashboard.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Suɓo daande sehil ɓurnde welde e nande.
tutorial.homeSubtitle: Ƴeewndo deeƴngo ngam kisal ñalnde kala.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Tappirɗe joy ina mbaawi ɓeydaade haa SOS e jeertinaango gardiiɗo.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Sosde daliilu moƴƴo ngam yaltude ngonka ka weldaani.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Fuɗɗo noddaango sehil e sahaa tigi-rigi so aɗa yiɗi ballal.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Ƴeewto jolɗe kisal e nder demo lowre.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Aɗtu jeewte ɗee sara maa nde skanndata.
jewelry.noDevices: Alaa kaɓirɗe NorthStar ɓadiiɗe tawaa tawo.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Bluetooth skannde waawaano fuɗɗaade. Tiiɗno enndu kadi.
jewelry.scanFailed: Min mbaawaano yiyde jeewte saraaji. Ƴeewto Bluetooth, jogo NorthStar ɓadiiɗo, enndit kadi.
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth skannde waawaano fuɗɗaade. Ƴeewto Bluetooth naatgol ngol, ƴeewto kadi.
jewelry.permissionDenied: Naatgol kaɓirgol ɓadiiɗo ina muusi. Jaɓ Bluetooth naatde e Dottaaɗe, caggal ɗuum ƴeewto.
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar juutii no feewi ngam jokkondirde. Ɓadtin ɗum, ƴeewto kadi.
jewelry.connectFailed: Min mbaawaano jokkondirde e NorthStar. Ƴeewto so ina charge e saraaji, caggal ɗuum ƴeewto.
jewelry.emptyMessage: Waɗde NorthStar charged e ɓadtaade ooɗoo telefoŋ, caggal ɗuum skannde kadi.

home.subtitle: Daasbord sehil kisal
home.readyBody: Daande, kartal, jeewte, e reenooɓe ko tap gooto.

map.title: Kartal kisal
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go ƴeewndo; Mapbox renndinde e nder mahdi ɓamtaare.
map.updateFailed: Min mbaawaano hesɗitinde nokkuure maa. Tiiɗno enndu kadi.
map.notRequested: Heɓde nokku oo ɗaɓɓaaka. Aɗa waawi softinde ɗum caggal ɗuum ummoraade e Cuɓe.
map.permissionOff: Naatgol nokku ina muusi. Softin ɗum e nder Cuɓe ngam senngo kartal kisal e dow maa.
map.timeout: Nokku maa ina juuta ko ɓuri ko cikkuɗaa. Moƴƴin nokku mo maande mum ɓuri laaɓtude, ƴeewto-ɗaa kadi.
map.savedEmptyMessage: Nokkuuji koolniiɗi ɗi resndu-ɗaa maa peeñ ɗoo ngam yaawde heɓde.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: Jokkondirde e kisal e sehil daande maa...
safetyCall.useOffline: Kuutoro sehil mo alaa e laylaytol
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Fuɗɗo noddaango walla winndu mesaas so aɗa hebii.

history.clearMessage: Ɗuum ittata ko AI mesasuuji sehilaaɓe hisnaaɗi e ndee kaɓirgol.
history.title: Daartol yeewtere
history.subtitle: AI mesasuuji sehilaaɓe keɓtinaaɗi e ooɗoo kaɓirgol.
history.emptyMessage: Jeewte maa AI sehil maa peeñ ɗoo caggal noddaango maa gadano.
history.loadFailed: Min mbaawaano loowde daartol yeewtere. Tiiɗno enndu kadi.
history.clearFailed: Min mbaawaano laaɓtinde daartol yeewtere. Tiiɗno enndu kadi.
history.deleteFailed: Min mbaawaa momtude ndeen yeewtere. Tiiɗno enndu kadi.

voices.title: Daandeeji noddaango kisal am
voices.subtitle: Suɓo daande sehil nde njiɗɗaa nande.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: This voice sample could not be played. Tiiɗno enndu kadi.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Hutoro jaabawuuli sehilaaɓe denndaaɗi so tawii lowre ndee walla Hume seedanteeje ɗee ngalaa.
settings.privacyBody: Yaltin walla momtu dokke nokkuuje mooftaaɗe e ndee kaɓirgol.
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Ɗuum ittata ko nate maa, dottaaɗe maa, jokkorɗe maa, daartol yeewtere maa, siftorde yamiroore maa, e jonnde hoolkiso nokkuure e ndee kaɓirgol.

sections.companionSubtitle: Daande e ɓure ɗe ngonaa e laylaytol
sections.deviceSafetySubtitle: NorthStar, reenooɓe, e jokkondiral e sahaa caɗtuɗo

settings.updateFailedMessage: Min mbaawaano hisnude ndeen ɓural. Tiiɗno enndu kadi.
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Joɗnde maa ina jokki haa jooni. Tiiɗno enndu kadi.

contacts.title: Jokkondiral e sahaa
contacts.subtitle: Yimɓe hoolaaɓe ina ngoodi e sahaa doggol kisal.
contacts.name: Innde
contacts.emptyMessage: Addude neɗɗo mo hoolaaki ngam ɓe mbaawa hesɗitinde nde safety flow ina haani ɓe.
contacts.removeMessage: Oo neɗɗo natta feeñde e doggol maa emergency.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Min mbaawaano hisnude ndee jokkorde. Ƴeewto defte ɗee, ƴeewto kadi.
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Min mbaawaano ittude ndee jokkorde. Tiiɗno enndu kadi.

friends.title: Sehilaaɓe
friends.subtitle: Gardiiɓe, ɗaɓɓaande, e grafik emergency.
friends.emptyMessage: Sehilaaɓe e reenooɓe hoolaaɓe maa peeñ ɗoo so ɓe ɓeydaama.

emergency.title: Caɗeele SOS
emergency.subtitle: Escalate tan ko nde aɗa sokli ballal ko yaawi.
emergency.body: Ɗuum maa humpit doggol kisal maa e peewnugol jokkondiral e sahaa caɗtuɗo.
emergency.addContact: Ɓeydu jokkorde ɓuuɓnde e nder Dottaaɗe.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Nokku renndinde stub ina hesɗi. Jokkondir e toɓɓere joofnirde renndinde backend ngam neldude jokkorɗe nguurndam.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tappirde
capybearTap.subtitle: Tappu NorthStar maa laabi ɗiɗi ngam jippinde oraas kisal.
capybearTap.body: Laawol geɗel ina hesɗi ngam wiring kewu BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Aɗa nanndi e neɗɗo mo alaa e laylaytol. Mesaas maa neldee so a jokkondirii.
errors.voiceQueued: Nelal hisnaama. Ma ɗum nelde so sehil daande oo jokkondirii.
errors.voiceConnecting: Jokkondirde e kisal e sehil daande maa...
errors.microphone: Naatgol mikroo ina haani ngam noddaango daande. Aɗa waawi softinde ɗum e Cuɓe, walla winndude mesaas e nokku mum.
errors.billing: Sehil daande internet oo heɓaaka e sahaa. Aɗa waawi jokkude e sehil mo alaa e laylaytol.
errors.authentication: Sehil daande oo waawaa hoolkisaade ndee jonnde. Naat kadi walla huutoro sehil mo alaa jokkorgal jooni.
errors.timeout: Sehil daande oo juutii no feewi ngam jaabaade. Ƴeewto jokkorde maa, ƴeewto kadi.
errors.network: Min mbaawaano yettaade sehil daande. Ƴeewto jokkorde maa, caggal ɗuum ƴeewto walla jokku tawa aɗa woni e jokkorde.
errors.genericVoice: Won ko taƴi noddaango daande ngoo. Enndu kadi, walla jokku e sehil mo alaa jokkorgal.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VeryLoving ina haani heɓde mikroo ngam kisal e noddaali AI sehilaaɓe.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VeryLoving huutortoo ko nokku maa ngam kartal kisal e geɗe kisal ɓadiiɗe.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: VeryLoving huutortoo ko Bluetooth ngam jokkondirde e NorthStar jeewte kisal maa.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Cuɓirgal ngal naatirde heɓotaako e mahngo ngoo.
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Mbaydi demo huutortoo ko keɓe ɗemngal ɗe puuyɗe tan. Carwe ceŋiiɗe ɗee ƴeewtinaaka, tee jooɗnde ndee fuɗɗitoto so jaaɓnirgal ngal loowtaama kadi.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Kod ƴeewtagol oo moƴƴaani walla hiiɗii. Ɗaɓɓit kod keso, eto kadi.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Etagol naatde ɓurii heewde. Faddu seeɗa, eto kadi.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Ƴeewtagol naatde ɓurii juutde. Ƴeewto ceŋol maa, eto kadi.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Min mbaawaa heɓde carwol naatirde. Ƴeewto ceŋol maa, eto kadi.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Karte kisal oo loowaaki. Ƴeewto ceŋol maa, eto kadi.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Nokku gonɗo jooni heɓotaako. Hollude nokku maa cakkitiiɗo mooftaaɗo iwde %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Min mbaawaa lollinde nokku maa. Ƴeewto yamiroore nokku, eto kadi.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Ɗoo woni nokku am mooftaaɗo e %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Ɗoo woni nokku am cakkitiiɗo mooftaaɗo e %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Jeyaaɗe Bluetooth koko ndaaƴaa. Hurmin ɗum e Teelte, eto kadi.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Bluetooth koko ñifaa. Hurmin ɗum, eto kadi.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Jokkondiral Bluetooth heɓotaako e kaɓirgol ngal walla mahngo ngoo.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Min ndaawaaki yiyde NorthStar. Haɓɓu ɗum ɓadii, ƴeewto Bluetooth, eto kadi.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Alaa kaɓirɗe NorthStar ɓadiiɗe njiytaaɗe. Haɓɓu ɗum ɓadii, yiylo kadi.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Min mbaawaa seŋaade e NorthStar. Haɓɓu ɗum jogii doole tee ɓadii, eto kadi.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Min mbaawaa mooftude nokku oo. Eto kadi.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Ballondiral sawto heɓotaako jooni. Eto kadi caggal walla jokku e ballondiral moƴƴo tawa alaa ceŋol.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
